About Me

Passionate about code
& craft.

"I don't just write code — I architect experiences that feel effortless to use."

I'm a Computer Science Engineering student with a deep love for full-stack development. From crafting pixel-perfect UIs to designing scalable backend systems, I thrive at every layer of the stack.
